nasb.text: “You shall not charge interest to your countrymen: interest on money, food, or anything that may be loaned at interest.

esv.text: “You shall not charge interest on loans to your brother, interest on money, interest on food, interest on anything that is lent for interest.

cnv.text: 你借給你兄弟的銀錢、食物，或是任何可以生利的東西，都不可取利。

ccb.text: “你们借给同胞钱、粮食或其他任何东西，都不可收取利息。
